attributes.additional_details: It is clear to see that certain parties are influenced by foreign agents. The current party is not acting in the interests of the British public and hence a general election must be called.
attributes.background: We, the British public, do not believe the current government is acting in the true interests of the British Public. We demand, through a general public vote of 'no confidence' a general election to elect a truer representation of the people of the UK.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition:

General election now – and always call one if a PM is replaced
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/771833
